claims.claim: This paper evaluates an output-aware reset gate that inspects project output evidence (project decisions, run notes, artifacts, logs) before permitting a terminal reset.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: In a historical audit of 1,207 wake-gate run records, a state-only baseline identified 18 reset candidates (all in `error` state), yet all 18 possessed durable terminal output or useful intermediate artifacts.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: The output-aware gate suppressed all 18 resets, reducing false-positive and review-required resets from 18 to 0.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: These results support adding an output-aware guard before destructive terminal reset actions, though the observed corpus does not exercise the no-output reset path under real conditions, limiting recall estimation for genuinely reset-worthy runs.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: This paper investigates whether an output-aware reset gate—inspecting project output evidence before permitting a terminal reset—can eliminate this class of false-positive resets.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: Before resetting a terminal or stale run, inspect output evidence: project decision files, run notes, result and artifact directories, and logs.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: If a terminal project decision exists, suppress reset and ingest the result.
claims.notes: Historical backfill linked the claim to already published artifacts; this is not independent source revalidation.

claims.claim: We evaluate this policy through a deterministic fixture harness and a historical audit of 1,207 local wake-gate run records.
